title: Klaviyo Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Klaviyo worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Klaviyo Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Klaviyo is the platform for intelligent marketing automation that positions itself for e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce. Founded in 2012, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Klaviyo is a solid choice for e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Klaviyo offers a free plan, with paid plans from $45/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Klaviyo works best for e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well. If you need something different, check the alternatives section.

faq.a: Yes, Klaviyo has a free plan supporting up to 500 subscribers. This makes it accessible for new senders testing the platform.

faq.q: What is Klaviyo best used for?
faq.a: Klaviyo is best for e-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce. Its standout features include e-commerce integrations, predictive analytics, segmentation, which suit this use case well.
Klaviyo is generally beginner-friendly. The interface is straightforward for basic campaigns, though advanced automation features have a learning curve.

faq.q: Does Klaviyo have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Klaviyo does not currently offer an affiliate program. This is worth considering if you plan to recommend the platform to your audience.
